reasoning: The base rate is established by the YFinance summary linear estimate: P(value > 156.4) = 0.52 for the shortest horizon (May 18). Because ATO has strong fundamental earnings momentum, long-term trends push the probability slightly higher as time expands, climbing towards ~60% over 6 months because the market has mathematically positive expectancy of ~6-10% a year, overcoming occasional ~$0.87 quarterly dividend drops.
